  notes varchar [note: 'Free-form notes and comments regarding this compliance calendar entry. May include special instructions, historical context, or coordination details.']
  notification_sent_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether alert notifications have been sent to responsible parties for this compliance calendar entry.']
  obligation_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the compliance obligation including specific requirements, deliverables, and any special instructions or conditions.']
  obligation_reference_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier for the compliance calendar entry. May reference external permit numbers, regulatory filing codes, or internal tracking identifiers.']
  obligation_title varchar [note: 'Short descriptive title of the compliance obligation for display and reporting purposes.']
  obligation_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the compliance obligation. Defines the nature of the calendar entry and determines workflow and escalation rules. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: permit_renewal|regulatory_filing|audit|training_deadline|policy_review|inspection|reporting_deadline — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  priority_level varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to this compliance obligation based on risk, regulatory impact, and business criticality.']
  recurrence_pattern varchar [note: 'Frequency with which this compliance obligation recurs. Determines whether the calendar entry is a one-time event or repeating obligation. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: one_time|daily|weekly|monthly|quarterly|semi_annual|annual|biennial — 8 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  regulatory_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory body, government agency, or authority that mandates this compliance obligation.']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Department or functional area responsible for managing and completing this compliance obligation.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessment of the risk exposure if this compliance obligation is not met on time. Considers regulatory penalties, operational impact, and reputational risk.']
  scope_level varchar [note: 'Organizational scope of the compliance obligation. Indicates whether the obligation applies to a single property, corporate entity, regional group, brand, or entire portfolio.']
  supporting_documents_required varchar [note: 'List or description of supporting documentation required to complete this compliance obligation such as certificates, reports, or attestations.']
  waiver_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the granted waiver expires and the compliance obligation becomes active again. Null for permanent waivers.']
  waiver_granted_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a waiver or exemption was granted for this compliance obligation by the regulatory authority or internal governance.']
  waiver_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation or justification for why a waiver was granted for this compliance obligation. Required when waiver flag is true.']

  Note: 'Master compliance calendar and obligation schedule for Travel Hospitality properties and corporate entities. Captures calendar entry reference, obligation type (permit renewal, regulatory filing, audit, training deadline, policy review, inspection, reporting deadline), property or entity scope, due date, lead time alert days, responsible owner, recurrence pattern (one-time, monthly, quarterly, annual), linked obligation or permit reference, completion status (upcoming, overdue, completed, waived), and completion date. Enables proactive compliance management by surfacing upcoming deadlines and preventing regulatory lapses across the portfolio.'
}

Table compliance.regulatory_requirement {
  regulatory_requirement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for regulatory_requirement']
  parent_regulatory_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on regulatory_requirement (parent_regulatory_requirement_id)']
  superseded_by_requirement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the regulatory requirement that supersedes or replaces this requirement. Null if not superseded.']
  applicability_scope varchar [note: 'Description of which properties, business units, or operations are subject to this requirement (e.g., all properties, luxury segment only, properties with food service).']
  certification_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a formal certification or license is required to demonstrate compliance (True/False).']
  certification_type varchar [note: 'Type of certification or license required (e.g., ServSafe, liquor license, fire marshal certificate, ADA compliance certificate).']
  compliance_obligation varchar [note: 'Specific actions or conditions that must be met to satisfy the regulatory requirement.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory requirement record was first created in the system.']
  description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the regulatory requirement, including what is mandated and the scope of applicability.']
  documentation_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether formal documentation or records must be maintained to demonstrate compliance (True/False).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory requirement becomes enforceable and binding.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory requirement ceases to be enforceable. Null for requirements with no defined end date.']
  inspection_frequency varchar [note: 'Required frequency of inspections or audits to verify compliance (annual, semi-annual, quarterly, monthly, on-demand, event-driven).']
  issuing_authority varchar [note: 'Name of the governmental or regulatory body that issued the requirement (e.g., European Commission, OSHA, ADA, FDA, state liquor board).']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic or legal jurisdiction where the requirement applies (e.g., USA, California, European Union, United Kingdom).']
  jurisdiction_level varchar [note: 'Level of government or regulatory authority (international, federal, national, state, provincial, local, municipal).']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory requirement was last reviewed or assessed for applicability and accuracy.']
  maximum_penalty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum monetary penalty or fine amount that can be imposed for non-compliance, in the currency specified.']
  next_review_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next review or reassessment of the regulatory requirement.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional notes, comments, or internal guidance related to the regulatory requirement.']
  penalty_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the penalty amount (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  penalty_description varchar [note: 'Description of penalties, fines, or sanctions that may be imposed for non-compliance.']
  property_segment varchar [note: 'Hotel or property segment to which the requirement applies (all, luxury, premium, select-service, resort, extended-stay).']
  record_retention_years varchar [note: 'Number of years that compliance records must be retained as mandated by the requirement.']
  reference_url varchar [note: 'Web link to the official text or authoritative source of the regulatory requirement.']
  regulation_section varchar [note: 'Specific section, article, or clause within the source regulation that defines this requirement.']
  renewal_period_months varchar [note: 'Number of months between required renewals of certification or compliance verification. Null if no renewal is required.']
  requirement_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique code or reference number for the regulatory requirement (e.g., GDPR-ART-6, OSHA-1910.38, ADA-Title-III).']
  requirement_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title of the regulatory requirement.']
  requirement_type varchar [note: 'Categorical classification of the regulatory requirement domain (e.g., data privacy, health and safety, accessibility, fire safety, food safety, liquor licensing, environmental, labor, financial, building code).']
  responsible_department varchar [note: 'Internal department or function responsible for ensuring compliance with this requirement (e.g., Legal, Risk Management, Operations, Human Resources).']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Category of risk associated with non-compliance (operational, financial, reputational, legal, safety, environmental).']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Risk severity level associated with non-compliance (critical, high, medium, low).']
  source_regulation varchar [note: 'Name or citation of the parent regulation, statute, or legal framework from which this requirement derives (e.g., GDPR, OSHA 1910, ADA Title III, CCPA).']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the regulatory requirement (active, inactive, pending, superseded, repealed, draft).']
  training_frequency varchar [note: 'Required frequency of employee training to maintain compliance (annual, biennial, one-time, as-needed).']
  training_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether employee training is mandated by the requirement (True/False).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the regulatory requirement record was last modified.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version or revision number of the regulatory requirement, used to track changes over time.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for regulatory_requirement. Referenced by regulatory_requirement_id.'
}
